## Codex CLI version

## Login state

## Symptom

- [ ] app-server does not start
- [ ] Model list is unavailable
- [ ] Thread or turn fails
- [ ] Tool approval or sandbox behavior is unexpected
- [ ] MCP / Skill behavior is unexpected
- [ ] Other

## Reproduction and sanitized logs

Never include tokens, prompts, private workspace content, or account details.
